# Read the file
path = "/mnt/data/file-SAdjSEQs8UJxzSevWcHAZ2-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text), text[:5000]

text = open("/mnt/data/file-SAdjSEQs8UJxzSevWcHAZ2-text_to_analyse.txt",'r',encoding='utf-8').read()
# find all pairs of double quote characters
indices = [i for i,ch in enumerate(text) if ch == '"']
indices[:20], len(indices)

pairs = list(zip(indices[::2], indices[1::2]))
spans = [(start+1,end, text[start+1:end]) for start,end in pairs]  # content between quotes: span_start is start+1; span_end is end (exclusive)
spans

def context(start, window=80):
    s = max(0, start-window)
    return text[s:start]
for start,end,_ in spans:
    print((start,end))
    print(context(start, 120))
    print("----")

# Build the citations list
types = ["Aya","Aya","Hadeeth","Hadeeth","Hadeeth","Hadeeth","Hadeeth","Hadeeth","Hadeeth","Hadeeth"]
citations = []
for (start,end,span_text), ctype in zip(spans, types):
    citations.append({"span_start": start, "span_end": end, "span_text": span_text, "citation_type": "Aya" if ctype=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"})
citations[:3], len(citations)
